title: felicia esterhuysenii
intro: Felicia esterhuysenii, also known as the yellow Felicia or Estershoek felicia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Felicia esterhuysenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and wellness.
